habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Rage (Ex) A wolverine that takes damage in combat flies into a rage on its next turn, clawing and biting madly until either it or its opponent is dead. It gains +4 to Strength, +4 to Constitution, and -2 to AC. The creature cannot end its rage voluntarily.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Rage (Ex) A wolverine that takes damage in combat flies into a rage on its next turn, clawing and biting madly until either it or its opponent is dead. It gains +4 to Strength, +4 to Constitution, and -2 to AC. The creature cannot end its rage voluntarily.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Wolverine
N Medium animal
Init +2
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +10
AC 14, touch 12, flat-footed 12 (+2 Dex, +2 natural)
hp 22 ((3d8+9))
Fort +5, Ref +5, Will +2
Speed 30 ft., climb 10 ft., burrow 10 ft.
Melee 2 claw +4 (1d6+2 slashing)
Melee Bite +4 (1d4+2 piercing)
Special Attacks rage
Special Abilities Rage (Ex) A wolverine that takes damage in combat flies into a rage on its next turn, clawing and biting madly until either it or its opponent is dead. It gains +4 to Strength, +4 to Constitution, and -2 to AC. The creature cannot end its rage voluntarily.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 15, Dex 15, Con 15, Int 2, Wis 12, Cha 10
Base Atk +2; CMB +4; CMD 16
Feats Skill Focus (Perception), Toughness
Skills Climb +10, Perception +10
Environment  cold forests
Organization solitary
Treasure none
Source PFRPG Bestiary
